paneContent:
└ 65 lines...

◐ Both plans look solid and match what I need, so I'll approve them both and have them 
  use `hub send` with the correct STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL for their implementation going 
  forward.

● Both peers have sound plans. I'll approve and instruct them on the correct server URL
  and hub send usage.

● approve plans (shell)
  │ ENV_FILE=$(ls -t .storyboard/terminals/*.env 2>/dev/null | head -1); source
  │ "$ENV_FILE"; export
  │ STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://storyboard-core.localhost/branch--0.5.0"; cd
  │ /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0; HUB_ID=hub_d8dfc4fb0f; npx
  │ storyboard hub send --hub "$HUB_ID" --sender "$STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID" --body "$(cat…
  └ 27 lines...

● wait 4min for implementation (shell)
  └ ENV_FILE=$(ls -t .storyboard/terminals/*.env 2>/dev/null | head -1); source
    "$ENV_FILE"; export
    STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL="http://storyboard-core.localhost/branch--0.5.0"; sleep 240;
    tail -30 .storyboard/terminal-buffers/agent-73wm2m.buffer.txt; echo
    "===BLUE-OSPREY==="; tail -30 .storyboard/terminal-buffers/agent-afqftv.buffer.txt

◉ Spawning component-set hub (Esc to cancel · 24.3 KiB)
 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0 [⎇ 0.5.0*%]             @CanvasControls.jsx
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯  
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 / commands · ? help · ctrl+q enqueue · ctrl+x → b background task
 terminal-agent · Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)(Internal only)
